/usr/bin/ar qc libriscv.a CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/debug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/decode_bytecodes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/decoder_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/machine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/machine_defaults.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/memory_elf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/memory_mmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/memory_rw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/native_libc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/native_threads.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/posix/minimal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/posix/signals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/posix/threads.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/posix/socket_calls.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/serialize.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/util/crc32c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/rv32i.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/rv64i.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/linux/system_calls.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/threaded_dispatch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/threaded_inaccurate_dispatch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/tr_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/tr_emit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/tr_translate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/tr_compiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/libriscv/tr_tcc.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/riscv.dir/__/__/__/_deps/tinycc-src/libtcc.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libriscv.a
